assertions.description: REVIEW: 32 RJ45 data pins appear as isolated __unnamed_0 through __unnamed_31 single-pin nets. All should be on SIG1-SIG8. SIG1-SIG3,SIG6 have zero pins resolved. SIG4,SIG5,SIG7,SIG8 each only have 1 cap pin (missing 3 RJ45 pins each).
REVIEW: Reports 41 nets but actual design has only 9 (GND + SIG1-SIG8). Inflated by 32 spurious single-pin nets from broken wire tracing.
